source_texts: 하고 번차례로 인사를 한다. 영신은 머리만 숙여 답례를 하고, 그 말에는 얼른 대답을 못 한다. 아침볕을 눈이 부시도록 온몸에 받으며 눈물 흔적을 보이지 않으려고 바다 저편을 바라다보고 섰었기 때문이다. 그는 조금 뒤에야,
하고 같이 운동을 하고 나서 혈색 좋은 여러 사람의 얼굴을 둘러본다.
"미상불 그 노래 잘 지었지요? 답답헌 때 한바탕 부르구 나면 속이 후련허거든요."
"저 사람은 구렝이 제 몸 추듯 그저 제 자랑을 못 해서…… 그만 게 무슨 자랑인가?"
"그럼 다른 건 몰라두, 청석골에 애향가 같은 노래를 부르는 조기회야 있겠나?"
하고 미소를 띤 영신의 얼굴을 슬쩍 흘려본다.

## Reception of Enlightenment Movement Members and Speeches

- **Source flow**: Scene opens at a crowded reception for student enlightenment members. Park Dong-hyeok (agriculture) delivers a radical speech urging ideological unity ('Vnarod') and rejecting aloofness, triggering applause and a dissenting shout ('deviation'). Moderator warns against mixing enlightenment with ideology. Chae Yeong-sin (theology) is called; she refuses initially, criticizing gendered order and censorship, before reluctantly standing. Post-reception, Dong-hyeok and Yeong-sin share a tense streetcar ride; she is locked out of her dorm. They fail to contact rural leader Baek Hyeon-gyeong. Dong-hyeok becomes infatuated and distracted, receiving an invite from Yeong-sin to a Saturday gathering at Baek's. At the gathering, Dong-hyeok critiques the group's hypocrisy (Western decor vs. rural reality), arguing leaders must share farmers' sensory life ('manure' vs. 'perfume'). Baek is silenced; Yeong-sin moved. They leave together, walking intimately to a mineral spring, pledging to abandon studies for rural salvation. Narrative shifts to Dong-hyeok's drought-stricken village; his father resents his communal focus, while drunk brother Dong-hwa accuses him of wasting youth. Yeong-sin writes she is ill and will arrive Tuesday to observe. Miraculous rain ends drought. Dong-hyeok secures separate seaside lodging for her to avoid gossip. Villagers (led by Geon-bae) welcome her with rustic hospitality and marriage rumors. Dong-hyeok guards her hut from a distance; Yeong-sin feels hurt by his formal reserve despite understanding his intent.

- **Target flow**: Maintain vivid, sensory narration (stuffy hall, tanned faces, rain, mud) shifting to high-register rhetorical intensity for speeches and internal monologues. Dialogue must capture clashes: formal moderation vs. radical fervor; elite performative activism vs. authentic grassroots immersion; rustic banter vs. intellectual reserve. Dong-hyeok's voice is baritone, forceful, metaphorical, and morally rigorous. Yeong-sin is concise, defiant, polite yet determined, revealing vulnerability internally. Baek is flowery, defensive, and teasing. Geon-bae is loud, colloquial, and boisterous. Father is weary/traditional; Dong-hwa is slurred/aggressive. Balance romantic tension with political solidarity; ensure 'protective distance' reads as self-sacrificing yet emotionally obstructive.

- **Style continuity**: High contrast between descriptive narration (heat, sound, sensory details of rural life) and polemical/psychological depth. Distinct registers for 'clown' figures (guitarist, Geon-bae) vs. serious activists. Maintain tension between elevated spiritual mission and coarse earthy realism. Physical proximity descriptions should be vivid but restrained. Internal monologues blend romantic infatuation with political recognition ('comrade').

Relationship status: Dong-hyeok and Yeong-sin are ideological comrades with deepening romantic tension, currently stalled by Dong-hyeok's protective reserve and village gossip. Plot trajectory: Moved from city/intellectual sphere to rural grassroots reality. - source: "참말 공부니 뭐니 다 집어치구 시굴루 내려가야겠어요. 공부를 한다는 핑계로 서울 와 서나 혼자 편안히 지내는 게 어머니께나 동리 사람들한테까지 큰 죄를 짓는 것 같어요. 첨엔 멋도 모르구서 무슨 성공을 허구야 내려간다고 하나님께 맹세꺼정 허구 올라왔지만 요…… 더군다나 아까 백선생 댁에서 허신 말씀을 듣구, 이제까지 지내 온 걸 여간 뉘우치지 않었어요."
  target: "Indeed, I should give up studying and everything else and go down to the countryside. It feels like a great sin against my mother and even the villagers to come to Seoul under the pretext of studying and live comfortably by myself. At first, without knowing anything, I even made a vow to God that I would achieve something before going down, but now... Especially after hearing what Mr. Baek said at his house earlier, I deeply regret how I have lived until now."
- source: 그 말을 듣자 동혁은 벌떡 일어섰다. 양복 바지에다가 두 손을 찌르고 거진 궐련 한 개를 태울 동안이나 왔다갔다하며 무슨 생각에 잠겼다가 영신의 앞으로 다가서며,
  target: Hearing these words, Dong-hyeok jumped to his feet. With his hands thrust into his suit pants, he paced back and forth for nearly the time it would take to smoke one cigarette, lost in thought, before approaching Yeong-sin and saying,
- source: "영 신 씨!"
  target: "Ms. Yeong-sin!"
- source: 하고 힘차게 부른다.
  target: he called out forcefully.
- source: "우리 둘이 이렇게 만나서 한 십 년이나 사귄 동지처럼 가슴을 터놓구 하룻밤을 새운 기념을 우리 영원히 남기십시다."
  target: "Let us make this night we spent together, opening our hearts like comrades who have known each other for ten years, a memory that will last forever."
- source: 하고 중대한 동의를 한다.
  target: he said, making a solemn proposal.
- source: "어떻게요?"
  target: "How?"
- source: 영신의 눈은 별빛에 새파랗게 빛난다. 동혁은 버썩 대들어 그 소댕 같은 손으로 서슴지 않  고 여자의 두 손을 덥석 잡으며,
  target: Yeong-sin's eyes shone blue in the starlight. Dong-hyeok boldly stepped forward and, without hesitation, firmly grasped the woman's two hands with his large, calloused hands, saying,
- source: "우리 시굴루 내려갑시다! 이번 기회에 공부구 뭐구 다 집어치우구서 우리의 고향을 지키러 내려갑시다! 한 가정을 붙든다느니버덤두 다 쓰러져 가는 우리의 고향을 붙들기 위 한 운동을 일으키기 위해서, 자 용기를 냅시다! 그네들을 위해서 일을 허다가 죽는 한이 있드래두 선구자로서의 기쁨과 자랑만은 남겠지요."
  target: "Let us go down to our countryside! On this occasion, let us abandon our studies and everything else and go down to protect our homeland! Rather than trying to hold onto a single household, let us summon the courage to launch a movement to hold onto our collapsing homeland! Even if we die while working for their sake, the joy and pride of being a pioneer will remain."
- source: 영신이가 무엇에 아찔하게 취한 듯이 눈을 내리감고 있는 것은 불시에 두방망이질을 하는 심장의 고동을 진정하려 함이다. 그는 마주 일어서서 동혁에게 으스러지도록 잡힌 두 손에 힘을 주며,
  target: Yeong-sin closed her eyes as if dizzy from something, trying to calm the pounding of her heart, which was suddenly beating like two mallets. She stood up facing him, putting strength into her two hands that were being crushed in Dong-hyeok's grip, and said,
- source: "고맙습니다! 당신 같으신 동지를 얻게 해주신 하나님께 감사합니다."
  target: "Thank you! I thank God for allowing me to find a comrade like you."
- source: 영신은 더 길게 말하지 않았다. 어느덧 인왕산 너머로 기울어 가는 달빛 아래서 두 남녀의 마주 쏘아보는 네 줄기 시선은 비상한 결심에 빛나고 있었다.
  target: Yeong-sin spoke no further. Under the moonlight already tilting beyond Inwang Mountain, the four lines of sight from the man and woman gazing at each other shone with an extraordinary resolve.
- source: 일적천금(一滴千金)
  target: A single drop is worth a thousand gold.
- source: 날이 가물어서 동리마다 소동이 대단하다. 정월 대보름날은 하루 종일 진눈깨비가 휘 뿌려서 송아지 한 마리를 태우는 윷놀이판에 헤살을 놓았었고, 모처럼 풍물을 차리고 나선 두레 꾼들을 찬비 맞은 족제비 꼴을 만들더니, 그 뒤로 석 달째 접어든 오늘까지 비 한 방울 구경을 못 하였다.
  target: The drought has caused great commotion in every village. On the day of the Daeboreum full moon in the first lunar month, sleet sprayed all day long, ruining the Yutnori board where a calf was being wagered, and turning the farmers who had set out with their wind and percussion instruments for the first time in a while into the likeness of weasels drenched in cold rain. Since then, not a single drop of rain has been seen until today, now entering the third month.
- source: "허어 이 날, 사람을 잡으려구 이렇게 가무는 게여."
  target: "Heavens, is the sky trying to kill people by drying up like this?"
- source: 바싹 마른 흙이 먼지처럼 피어올라 폴삭폴삭 날리는 보리밭에 붓을 주던 박첨지는, 기신 없이 괭이질을 하던 손을 쉬고 허리를 펴며 혼자말로 탄식을 한다. 그는 검버섯이 돋은 이마에 주름살을 잡으며 머리 위를 우러러본다. 그러나 가을날처럼 새파란 하늘에는 구름 한 점 찾아 낼 수가 없다. 바닷가의 메마른 농촌에 바람만 진종일 씽씽 불어서 콧구멍이 막히고 목의 침이 말라드는 것 같다.
  target: While hoeing the barley field where the bone-dry soil rose like dust and fluttered about, Park Cheom-ji stopped his listless hoeing, straightened his back, and sighed to himself. Wrinkling his forehead, which was spotted with age marks, he looked up at the sky. However, not a single cloud could be found in the blue sky, clear as an autumn day. In this dry coastal farming village, the wind blew briskly all day long, making it feel as though his nostrils were blocked and the saliva in his throat was drying up.
- source: "이런 제에기, 보리싹이 연골에 말러 배틀어지니 올 여름엔 냉수만 마시구 산담메."
  target: "Damn it, the barley sprouts are drying up while still tender and turning white; this summer we'll have to survive on cold water alone."
- source: 늙은이는 다시 한번 말과 한숨을 뒤섞어 내뿜고는, 이제야 겨우 강아지풀 잎사귀만하게 꼬리를 흔드는 보리싹을 짚신발로 걷어찬다. 그러다가 화풀이로 쌈지를 긁어 희연 부스러기한 대를 태워 물고 빼끔빼끔 빨다가 괭이 자루에 탁탁 털어 버린다.
  target: The old man exhaled once more, mixing words with a sigh, and then kicked the barley sprouts, which were finally waving their tails no larger than foxtail leaves, with his straw sandals. Then, in a fit of anger, he struck his flint, lit a piece of crushed tobacco stem, took a few puffs, and tapped it out against the hoe handle.
- source: 그는 한참 동안이나 멍하니 섰다가 그래도 하는 수 없다는 듯이 멍에같이 굽은 허리를 주먹으로 두어 번 두드린 뒤에, 손바닥에다 침을 튀튀 뱉더니 다시 괭이를 잡는다.
  target: He stood blankly for quite some time, but as if there were no other choice, he thumped his yoke-like bent back a couple of times with his fist, spat vigorously into his palm, and grabbed the hoe again.
- source: "참 정말 큰일났구려. 참죽나무에 순이 나는 걸 보니깐 못자리 헐 때두 지냈는데, 비 한 방울이나 구경을 해야 허지 않소."
  target: "Truly, this is a great disaster. Seeing the shoots on the Ailanthus tree, the time for preparing the seedbeds has already passed; we must at least see a drop of rain."
- source: 곁두리 때가 훨씬 지나도록 바닷가에서 갯줄나물을 캐어 가지고 들어온 마누라가 영감의 등뒤에서 반나마 기운 광주리를 던지고, 기신없이 밭두덕에 가 주저앉으며 하는 말이다.
  target: It was well past the time for making kimchi, yet his wife, who had been out gathering seaweed by the shore, threw down a basket that was barely half full behind her husband's back and collapsed wearily onto the field ridge, saying:
- source: 앞니가 몽땅 함몰을 해서, 동리 계집애들은 그를 합죽할머니라고 놀린다.
  target: Because all her front teeth had sunken in, the village girls teased her, calling her Grandmother Hapjuk.
- source: "그러게 말요. 이대루 가물다간 기미(己未)년처럼 기우제를 지낸다구 떠들겠는걸."
  target: "That's right. If this drought continues, they'll be talking about holding a rain prayer ceremony just like in the Gi-Mi year."
- source: 박첨지는 마누라를 흘깃 돌려다보고 중얼중얼 군소리하듯 한다.
  target: Park Cheom-ji glanced at his wife and muttered as if complaining to himself.
- source: "너구리굴 보구 피물돈버텀 내쓴다구 동혁이 월급 탈 때만 바라구서 조합 돈꺼정 써놨으니, 참 정말 입맛이 소태 같구려."
  target: "Spending money we don't have just because we saw a raccoon hole, relying only on Dong-hyeok's monthly salary, and even using up the cooperative funds—truly, my mouth tastes as bitter as saltwort."
- source: 영감의 말을 한숨으로 화답하던 마누라는,
  target: His wife, who had responded to her husband's words with a sigh, said:
- source: "그래두 동혁이가 어떡허든지 우리 양주 배야 곯게 하겠수?"
  target: "Even so, no matter what Dong-hyeok does, do you think he would let our bellies go hungry?"
- source: "명색이라두 학교 졸업이나 했으면 모를까, 지금 와서 전들 무슨 뾰죽헌 수가 있나베. 양식이라 구 인젠 묵은 보리 여남은 말이 달랑달랑허는데……."
  target: "If he had at least graduated from school, it would be one thing, but what special plan could he possibly have now? As for food, we only have about eight mal of old barley left, hanging by a thread..."
- source: "아무튼 그 자식이 우리집 기둥인데 조석 때마다 동리 일만 헌다구 몰아세질랑 마슈. 그렇게 성화를 헌다구 말을 들을 듯싶우? 제가 허구 싶어서 허는 노릇을. 목이 말러두 주막에가 서 탁배기 한잔 입에 대지 않는 자식을 가지구서……."
  target: "In any case, don't keep pressing him, saying he only does village work morning and night, when that boy is the pillar of our house. Do you think he would listen if you nagged him like that? He does it because he wants to. Think of a son who won't even touch a drop of makgeolli at the tavern even when his throat is parched..."
- source: "글쎄, 오늘두 여태 안 들어오는 걸 좀 보우. 아비가 올버텀은 일이 심에 부쳐서 당최 꿈지럭 거리 질 못하는 줄 뻔히 알면서 나댕기기만 허니 말이지."
  target: "Well, just look at him; he still hasn't come home today. He knows full well that his father is so exhausted from work that he can't even move, yet he just keeps wandering around."
- source: "그래두 저 딴엔 동네에 유조헌 일을 헌답시구, 밥도 제때에 못 먹구 돌아댕기는 게 난 가엾어 못 보겠습디다."
  target: "Still, in his own way, he says he's doing something beneficial for the village, and it breaks my heart to see him wandering around without even eating on time."
- source: "아무튼 그놈의 농우횐가 강습횐가 허는 것버텀 없애 버려야 해. 동혁이 초사에 동리 젊은 녀석들은 한 놈이나 집에 붙어 있어야지. 밤낮 몰려댕기며 역적 모의허듯 쑥덕공론만 허니 밥이 생기나 옷이 생기나."
  target: "In any case, we must get rid of that so-called Farmers' Association or Training Center. At least one young man from each house should be home during Dong-hyeok's watch. Will rice or clothes appear just because they gather day and night, whispering conspiracies like traitors?"
- source: 박첨지는 혀를 끌끌 차며 젊은 사람들을 꾸짖고 마누라는 아들의 두둔을 하느라고 어느덧 땅거미 지는 줄을 모른다.
  target: Park Cheom-ji clicked his tongue as he scolded the young people, while his wife defended their son, unaware that twilight had already fallen.
- source: 맷방석만한 시뻘건 해는 맞은편 잿배기를 타고 넘는다.
  target: The crimson sun, as large as a straw mat, crossed over the opposite ash ridge.
- source: "저 해를 좀 보슈. 가물지 않겠나."
  target: "Just look at that sun. Won't there be a drought?"
- source: 한쪽을 찌긋한 마누라의 눈에는 흉년이 들 조짐이 보이는 듯하다. 그는 유심히 서녘 하늘을 바라다보다가,
  target: In the wife's half-closed eyes, signs of a poor harvest seemed to appear. She gazed intently at the western sky, then
- source: "아, 저어기 동혁이가 오는구려!"
  target: "Ah, there Dong-hyeok is coming!"
- source: 하고 아들의 그림자를 몇 해 만에야 발견하듯 가벼이 부르짖으며 무릎을 짚고 일어선다.
  target: she exclaimed lightly, as if discovering her son's shadow after several years, and rose, supporting herself on her knees.
- source: 박첨지 양주의 눈이 부시도록 넘어가는 석양을 등뒤에 받으면서 잿배기를 넘어오는 동혁의 윤곽은 점점 뚜렷이 나타났다. 회색 저고리 바지에 검정 조끼를 입고 삽을 둘러멘 동 혁이는 역광선에 원체 건장한 체격이 더한층 걸대가 커 보인다. 아들이 가까이 오자,
  target: With the dazzling setting sun behind him, Dong-hyeok's silhouette became increasingly distinct as he crossed the ash ridge. Wearing gray jacket and pants with a black vest and carrying a shovel over his shoulder, Dong-hyeok's already sturdy physique appeared even taller against the backlight. As his son approached,
- source: "점심두 안 들어와 먹구 여태 어디서 뭣들을 했니?"
  target: "You didn't even come in for lunch; where have you been and what have you been doing all this time?"
- source: 하고 묻는 아버지의 목소리는 아까 꾸짖던 때와는 딴판으로 부드럽다.
  target: his father's voice, as he asked, was completely different from earlier when he was scolding—it was soft.
- source: "공동답(共同畓) 못자릴 허려구 물을 푸는데 쌈들이 나서 입때꺼정 뜯어말리구 왔에요."
  target: "We were drawing water to prepare the seedbed for the communal paddy, but a fight broke out, and I spent all this time trying to stop it before coming back."
- source: "넌 집의 못자린 헐 생각두 않구, 공동답에만 매달리면 어떡허잔 말이냐?"
  target: "You have no intention of preparing the seedbed for our own house, and if you only devote yourself to the communal paddy, what are we supposed to do?"
- source: 아버지의 나무라는 말에 동혁은,
  target: At his father's rebuke, Dong-hyeok replied,
- source: "차차 허지요. 물 푸는 게 서툴르니까 어떻게 심이 드는지…… 두렁 밑을 파는 데두 논바닥이 바싹 말러서 세상 가래를 받어야지요."
  target: "We'll get there eventually. Since you're unskilled at drawing water, how could you possibly have the strength...? And digging beneath the ridge is difficult too, as the paddy floor has dried out completely, requiring a full-sized spade."
- source: 하고 집으로 들어가 세수를 하고 발을 씻고 제 방으로 들어가더니, 기직자리 위에 가 턱 눕는다. 누웠다느니보다도 진종일 삐친 팔다리를 쭈욱 뻗고 지쳐 늘어진 것이다. 산울 밖에서 걸귀가 꿀꿀거리는 소리가 들리건만, 꼼짝도 할 수가 없어서 누워 있노라니,
  target: Having said this, he went into the house, washed his face and feet, entered his own room, and collapsed face-down onto his woven straw mat. Rather than simply lying down, he was stretching out limbs that had been strained all day long, utterly exhausted and limp. Though he could hear a pig grunting outside the mountain hedge, he was unable to move a muscle and just lay there when,
- source: "저녁 먹어라."
  target: "Eat dinner."
- source: 하는 어머니의 목소리와 함께 된장찌개 냄새가 허기가 지도록 시장하던 동혁의 코에 맡혔다. 장물을 찔금 친 갯줄나물과 짠지쪽이 반찬이다.
  target: Along with his mother's voice, the smell of soybean paste stew reached Dong-hyeok's nose, making him even hungrier than he already was. The side dishes were sea mustard seasoned with a splash of soybean paste broth and slices of salted radish.
- source: "동화는 그저 안 들어왔에요? 들어오건 같이 먹지요."
  target: "Hasn't Dong-hwa come home yet? If he comes in, let's eat together."
- source: 동혁은 벌떡 일어나며 아우를 찾는다.
  target: Dong-hyeok sprang up and asked about his younger brother.
- source: "누가 아니. 수동이네 주막에서 대낮버텀 술을 처먹는다더니 여태 게 있는 게지. 뭐구 뭐 구 그 애가 맘을 못 잡어서 큰일났다. 글쎄 요샌 매일 장취로구나. 형두 형세가 부쳐서 허다만 공부를, 뭘 가지고 허겠다구 허고헌 날 성화를 받치니 온 살이 내릴 노릇이지. 큰말 강도 사네 작은아들이 대학굔가 졸업허구 와설라문 꺼덕대는 걸 보군, 버쩍 더 거염을 내 니 어쩌면 좋냐. 뱁새가 황새를 따르려다간 다리가 찢어지는 줄 모르구 덮어놓고 날뛰는구나.
  target: "Who knows? He said he'd be drinking at Sudong's tavern since early afternoon, so he's probably still there. That boy is in serious trouble; he just can't settle his mind. These days, he's drunk every single day. Even his older brother, struggling with the family's finances to continue his interrupted studies, is being pestered daily about what he plans to do with them; it's enough to make one's flesh waste away.
